visual_observations.eval-001-eiffel-ground: POOR — camera looking up at sky, no terrain/buildings visible. Ground-level views need 3D Tiles to be meaningful.
visual_observations.eval-003-eiffel-south: GOOD — clear Paris view with Seine, Champ de Mars, Trocadéro. lookAt worked well.
visual_observations.eval-005-nyc-skyline: WEAK — too flat/low, shows sprawling grid not dramatic skyline. Pitch too horizontal at this altitude.
visual_observations.eval-006-grand-canyon-rim: DECENT — rim terrain visible but canyon depth not dramatic. Needs steeper look angle.
visual_observations.eval-008-empire-north: GOOD — clear urban view looking south down Manhattan with Hudson visible.

notes: New v2 eval suite with 8 iconic landmark scenarios. Key finding: eval-001 (ground-level) reveals that ground-level camera views are essentially useless without 3D Tiles loaded — the skill should note this. eval-005 (NYC skyline) needs better altitude/pitch guidance for panoramic cityscape views.
